description: Gitea is an open-source self-hosted Git forge for source code hosting and collaboration. It provides repository, issue, organization, package, and related development platform features.
summary: Gitea exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the self-hosted Gitea REST API at `/api/v1`, authenticated by Basic auth, personal access tokens, or SSH-key HTTP signatures; no GraphQL, MCP server, or developer CLI surface was found.
